name: Staude Capital Global Value Fund Limited
analysis: GVF's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 6% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$1.3500, stop A$1.2820, target A$1.5539 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
